psalm-95-1.verse:
O come, let us sing for joy to the Lord,
  Let us shout joyfully to the rock of our salvation.
psalm-95-1.prayer: Lord, help me come before You with joyful singing. Let my heart praise You as the rock of my salvation.

psalm-95-2.verse:
Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving,
  Let us shout joyfully to Him with psalms.
psalm-95-2.prayer: Father, teach me to enter Your presence with thanksgiving and worship You with songs of joy.

psalm-95-3.verse:
For the Lord is a great God
  And a great King above all gods,
psalm-95-3.prayer: Lord, You are a great God and King above all. Help me live with reverence, trust, and awe before You.

psalm-95-4.verse:
In whose hand are the depths of the earth,
  The peaks of the mountains are His also.
psalm-95-4.prayer: Father, the depths of the earth and the heights of the mountains belong to You. Remind me that all creation is in Your hands.

psalm-95-5.verse:
The sea is His, for it was He who made it,
  And His hands formed the dry land.
psalm-95-5.prayer: Lord, You made the sea and formed the dry land. Help me worship You as Creator and Sustainer of all things.

psalm-95-6.verse:
Come, let us worship and bow down,
  Let us kneel before the Lord our Maker.
psalm-95-6.prayer: Father, teach me to bow down in worship and kneel before You with humility and devotion.

psalm-95-7.verse:
For He is our God,
  And we are the people of His pasture and the sheep of His hand.
  Today, if you would hear His voice,
psalm-95-7.prayer: Lord, You are my God, and I am one of the people of Your pasture. Help me listen to Your voice today.

psalm-95-8.verse:
Do not harden your hearts, as at Meribah,
  As in the day of Massah in the wilderness,
psalm-95-8.prayer: Father, keep my heart from becoming hardened. Help me respond to Your voice with obedience, humility, and faith.

psalm-95-9.verse:
“When your fathers tested Me,
  They tried Me, though they had seen My work.
psalm-95-9.prayer: Lord, forgive me when I test You or doubt Your faithfulness despite all You have done.

psalm-95-10.verse:
For forty years I loathed that generation,
  And said they are a people who err in their heart,
  And they do not know My ways.
psalm-95-10.prayer: Father, protect me from wandering in my heart. Teach me to know Your ways and remain faithful to You.

psalm-95-11.verse:
Therefore I swore in My anger,
  Truly they shall not enter into My rest.”
psalm-95-11.prayer: Lord, help me enter the rest You provide through trust, obedience, and surrender to Your will.

psalm-95-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for being my Creator, Shepherd, King, and rock of salvation. Help me worship You with joy, thanksgiving, humility, and reverence. Keep my heart soft toward Your voice, protect me from unbelief, and teach me to walk faithfully in Your ways. May my life honor You and rest securely in Your presence.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
